title: lyonia ovalifolia var. lanceolata
intro: Lyonia ovalifolia var. lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaved or oval-leaved Lyonia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Ericaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lyonia ovalifolia var. lanceolata include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Lyonia ovalifolia var. lanceolata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
